name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Zenvest

labels: enhancement

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature.

## 🤔 Problem Statement (Optional)
Is this related to a problem? Describe it.

## 💡 Solution (Optional)
How you'd like this feature to work.

## 📋 Use Cases
How would users benefit from this feature?

## 🎯 Acceptance Criteria
What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2

## 🔗 Related Issues
Reference any related issues: #123

## 📎 Additional Context
Any other context or mockups?
